description: Join the Binance Affiliate Rewards Bootcamp to learn how to become a successful crypto influencer. This program includes seven classes covering Binance trading products, content creation, and referral strategies, with opportunities for rewards and bonuses.
topic_summary: The Binance Affiliate Rewards Bootcamp offers education on becoming a crypto influencer, covering topics such as trading products [t=29:08], content creation [t=40:35], and referral strategies [t=61:70]. Participants can earn rewards based on project completion [t=160:33].
